OK, cool.
I don't want to keep you guys anywhere here.
Thank you so much for your time.
No, it's all good anytime, Adrian.
Yeah.
We cannot schedule the other quality times.
Talk to you.
perfect.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and SEO initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance improving: 8,500 more impressions, 50 more clicks week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Backlink project progressing well: 6 new backlinks added, 28 earned YTD from blog content](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Plans to enhance link magnet content with journalist collaboration, infographics, and expert quotes](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Content refresh/cannibalization audit planned for end of month, led by Dave](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [URL structure change recommended: remove dates from URLs to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates

  - [OSF page uploaded, but may need review for accuracy (healthcare API vs open-side spring work)](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Almost all content for the week already uploaded](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Adrian to provide authoritative sources for more accurate content creation](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Healthy jump in impressions (8,500) and clicks (50) week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [API pages remain top performers for clicks](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [API security and API performance are top-ranking categories](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Site performance shows consistent midweek dips](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Backlinking Project

  - [6 new backlinks added this week](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [28 backlinks earned from blog content since beginning of 2025](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Some backlinks are Zuplo-specific features](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Jimmy suggested "ego bait" strategy: mentioning partners in articles for social collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### Link Magnet Content

  - [Adrian working with journalist to enhance content with insights, research, and infographics](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Plan to create a one-pager and potentially a white paper](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Team discussed adding peer reviews and author bios to improve E-A-T signals](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Refresh and Cannibalization Project

  - [Dave to audit content for similarity and performance](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Will identify cannibalization issues and suggest edits for differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Plans to improve internal linking strategy for better indexing](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)

### URL Structure

  - [Current structure includes dates in URLs](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Recommendation to remove dates from URLs to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Adrian to implement changes and set up redirects as needed](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)

### Schema and CMS

  - [Schema implementation is semi-automated](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Zuplo uses a custom lightweight CMS through GitHub for flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to begin content audit and provide recommendations for refreshes and cannibalization fixes](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Adrian to send CSV of frequently cited sources to Jimmy for potential backlink outreach](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Adrian to update URL structure, removing dates and implementing necessary redirects](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [Dave and Adrian to discuss programmatic SEO ideas, including potential API directory](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Team to standardize URL structure for future content uploads](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [Adrian to schedule follow-up meeting with Dave to discuss programmatic SEO and API directory concept](https://fathom.video/share/kNHUJiTfu-XQbPX2zqJ-m3yBWWT_izdS?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)

Schedule meeting with Dave to discuss programmatic SEO and API directory ideas.
